author: Ryan Law
title: What AI Means for SEO
content:
You can't talk about SEO today without mentioning generative AI. There's a high chance you'll see an AI-generated answer in Google search results when you Google any keyword.

Many people use AI to publish SEO content quicker and cheaper than ever before, and it's even possible to research any company and buy their products directly through AI assistants like ChatGPT and Perplexity.

In a survey of almost 900 marketers, 87% used generative AI to help create content.

The article emphasizes that the three pillars of SEO—content creation, link building, and technical health—are all crucial to appearing in AI search results.
